description: The StringConcatenationDriver component constructs a string from the inputted list of strings.

fields.TargetString: The field to drive with the resulting completed string.
fields.Separator: What text to put between each pair of strings when building the string. This can be something like a comma, a space, or anything else the user desires.
fields.Strings: A list of strings to join together separated by ``Seperator``.
fields.NullOutputWhenAllAreNull: Whether to null the entire string when all ``Strings`` fields are null.

usage: Attach to a slot and add a list of strings to ``Strings`` and a ``TargetString`` for this to start working.
